title: Post-graduation work permit: Field of study - Eligible CIP codes for education - Canada.ca
content:
## Field of study: Eligible CIP codes for education
Last updated: July 4, 2025
Check below to find out which Classification of Instructional Programs (CIP) code (opens in a new tab) in the education category is eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP).
- Disability studies CIP code: 05.0210 Your CIP code is eligible.
Your CIP code is eligible.
- Deaf studies CIP code: 05.0211 Your CIP code is eligible.
Your CIP code is eligible.
- Education, general CIP code: 13.0101 Your CIP code is eligible.
Your CIP code is eligible.
- Bilingual and multilingual education CIP code: 13.0201 Your CIP code is eligible.
